author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more Tier-3s (xHCI hot path + PCI config-space accessors):

- drivers/usb/host-xhci.md: covers xhci.c + xhci-mem.c + xhci-ring.c + xhci-hub.c + xhci-pci.c + xhci-plat.c — xHCI 1.2 host controller (USB 2/3/4): per-host probe via PCIe binding with per-vendor quirks (Intel/AMD/ASMedia/Etron/NEC/Renesas/VIA/Fresco/TI), Device-Context-Base-Address-Array (DCBAA) per-slot ctx pointer table, scratchpad bufs, cmd-ring + event-ring + per-ep transfer-rings with cycle-bit semantics, slot allocation + Address-Device cmd lifecycle, per-endpoint context (control/bulk/interrupt/isoch + USB-3 streams up to 64K), TRB enq/deq with chained TDs + IOC/ISP/ENT bits, doorbell mmio-write triggering HW fetch, event-ring dequeue with cycle-bit-mismatch termination, root-hub emulation for usbcore, USB-3 LPM (U1/U2/U3) negotiation, system PM with controller-state save/restore + force-quirks for lost-context PCH, runtime PM auto-suspend, DCI debug-cap. 12 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (ring-OOB + cycle-bit-consistency + slot-id-OOB + dma-UAF) / Layer-2 ref to xhci_ring.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus queue↔complete round-trip.
- drivers/pci/access.md: covers drivers/pci/access.c + ecam.c — PCI config-space accessors: legacy CF8/CFC port-IO backend (x86, first 256B), MMCONFIG/ECAM backend (PCIe-spec, full 4 KB extended config-space via memremap'd MMIO region per ACPI MCFG), per-host-bridge pci_ops vtable selecting backend, per-device pci_read_config_*/_write_config_* dispatching through parent host-bridge ops, generic-ECAM with pci_generic_config_read/_read32 (32-bit-aligned-only quirk), pci_user_*_config_* sysfs-mediated access with CAP_SYS_RAWIO + per-bit filter, pci_lock_rescan_remove global hotplug serialization, ECAM region per-bus-stride 256KB (256 devs × 8 fns × 4KB). 10 REQ / 6 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (ECAM-OOB + legacy-OOB + cfg-lock-deadlock + MMIO-alignment) / Layer-2 ref to cap_iteration.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus read↔write round-trip.

Total state: 254 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 20 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main + bpf-verifier + vfio-pci-core + xhci + pci-access.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-usb-host-xhci, design-drivers-pci-access.

Next iter plan: drivers/iommu/intel-iommu.md (Intel VT-d driver — backbone of x86 server passthrough) + drivers/nvme/host-pci.md (NVMe PCIe transport — most-deployed NVMe path).
